title: Jurisdiction Profile
description: Structured country profile for the Jurisdictional Exposure Audit. Every non-obvious claim references claim IDs in the claim ledger. Confidence is recorded per section, never as a single overall score.

status.description: Only 'published' profiles render verified claims publicly.

confidence_summary.description: Per-section confidence. Mirrors the section keys below.

legal_system.description: e.g. common law, civil law, mixed.

tax_overview.description: Each property is a claimField. Keys: tax_residence_basis, worldwide_vs_territorial, citizenship_based_taxation, capital_gains_treatment, short_vs_long_term, wealth_tax, inheritance_tax, estate_tax, gift_tax, exit_tax, foreign_asset_reporting, crypto_specific_guidance, bitcoin_classification, treatment_btc_sales, treatment_btc_to_btc, treatment_btc_to_stablecoin, treatment_btc_payments, treatment_lightning, treatment_donations_gifts, treatment_btc_loans, treatment_etf_vs_self_custody, open_questions.

bitcoin_regulation.description: claimFields. Keys: legal_to_own, self_custody_allowed, hardware_wallets_restricted, exchanges_licensed, foreign_exchanges_accessible, custodians_regulated, stablecoins_regulated, mining_regulated, payments_allowed, businesses_may_hold, advisors_may_recommend, funds_etfs_allowed, btc_vs_broader_crypto, privacy_tools_restricted, advertising_consumer_rules, direction.

reporting_profile.description: claimFields. Keys: crs_participation, carf_status, fatf_travel_rule, beneficial_ownership_registry, exchange_reporting, broker_reporting, bank_reporting, foreign_account_reporting, foreign_asset_reporting, crypto_declaration, source_of_funds_expectations, aml_kyc_burden, data_sharing_agreements, direction_of_travel.

estate_profile.description: claimFields. Keys: forced_heirship, testamentary_freedom, trust_recognition, foundation_recognition, foreign_will_recognition, probate_process, probate_privacy, digital_asset_guidance, executor_powers, cross_border_enforcement, marital_property_regime, divorce_implications, beneficiary_designation, heirs_abroad, btc_under_estate_rules, authority_vs_access, open_questions.

banking_profile.description: claimFields. Keys: account_opening_ease, dollar_access, intl_transfer_friction, crypto_banking_friction, onramp_offramp_access, wire_delays_restrictions, source_of_funds_burden, derisking_patterns, business_banking_difficulty, capital_controls, stablecoin_usage, legal_vs_bankable.

asset_protection_profile.description: claimFields. Keys: account_freezing_powers, tax_liens, civil_forfeiture, emergency_decree_history, political_risk_to_assets, sanctions_exposure, court_compelled_disclosure, device_search_risk, exchange_record_access, practical_vs_theoretical, requires_counsel.

mobility_profile.description: claimFields. Keys: tax_residence_triggers, day_count_rules, domicile_rules, citizenship_obligations, exit_tax, investor_residency_programs, territorial_regimes, permanent_residency_requirements, citizenship_path, family_eligibility, bank_account_access, property_ownership, right_to_work, accidental_tax_residence_risk, passport_vs_residence_vs_tax_vs_domicile.

bitcoin_holder_implications.description: Practical, non-advisory implications per holding form.

direction_of_travel.description: Each label must carry evidence, source, rationale, confidence, counterevidence, and last_reviewed. Labels must specify 'friendly for whom' where the label is a friendliness claim.

sources.description: source_id references into the source ledger.

product_routing_notes.description: Non-advisory notes on which audit outputs this jurisdiction tends to surface.

claimField.description: A single jurisdictional claim. value carries the plain-language statement; claim_id links to the ledger; never publish without a source unless confidence is 'unknown' and the text is framed as an open question.
